claim_boundary: v6.0.1 determines the strongest action-supported relationship among candidate B8/S7 domains, time, signature, collar, measure, and lower-dimensional geometry. No stored parent action selects one candidate as the physical BHSM domain.

metrics.Einstein: round ratio 1; standard 3-Sasakian convention also admits Jensen ratio L_Q^2/L_H^2=1/5
metrics.name: quaternionic_canonical_variation
metrics.scalar_curvature: O'Neill expression R_H/L_H^2+R_V/L_Q^2-(L_Q^2/(4L_H^4))|F_Q|^2; constants depend on declared normalization
metrics.volume: pi^4 L_H^4 L_Q^3/3 in the standard convention

metrics.Einstein: round ratio L_1=L_C; generic deformation is not Einstein
metrics.name: complex_U1_variation
metrics.quaternionic_compatible: not as a uniform Sp(1) fiber unless extra equalities hold
metrics.scalar_curvature: O'Neill expression with U(1) curvature; normalization dependent away from round
metrics.volume: pi^4 L_C^6 L_1/3 in the standard convention

metrics.ansatz: g=L_4^2 g_S4+L_2^2 g_twistor,S2,cov+L_1^2 eta^2 with connection cross terms fixed by horizontal lift
metrics.connections: Sp(1) connection reduced by U(1) subset
metrics.isometry: intersection generically Sp(2)xU(1); enhancement at special equal scales
metrics.name: nested_independent_scales
metrics.quaternionic_compatible: when S2 and S1 combine to the declared Sp(1) fiber metric
metrics.scalar_curvature: requires both curvature normalizations and O'Neill tensors
metrics.volume: pi^4 L_4^4 L_2^2 L_1/3 in the compatible standard convention
